# medus-react (UI-Only)

This project is a standalone admin frontend.

## Scope
Only perform visual/UI development:
- React components and pages
- Routing and layout
- Styling, theme, design tokens
- i18n text/labels
- frontend-only mock data for UI rendering

## Do Not Do
- Backend/API server implementation
- Database schema/migrations
- Infrastructure/devops changes
- Medusa backend integration work

## Preferred Paths
- `src/components/**`
- `src/routes/**`
- `src/providers/**`
- `src/i18n/**`
- `src/lib/**` (frontend helpers + mock data)

## Validation
- `npm run build` must pass.
- Ensure loading/error/empty/success states for changed UI.
